name: RS232Receive
title: RS232Receive
syntax: dword RS232Receive( dword port, byte buffer[], dword size );
description: Receive blocks of bytes from a serial port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of bytes which can be received.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
